writing.title: Writing Task 1: Sequence of events
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a sequence of past events, using ago, last, then, after that, finally.
writing.sampleAnswer: First, I finished my homework. After that, I called my friend. Then we came together at the park, and finally we had dinner together.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 3 từ nối thời gian khác nhau
Các sự kiện theo đúng trình tự thời gian
Câu văn mạch lạc, dễ theo dõi

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Review — A memorable trip
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) describing a memorable trip, combining was/were, regular & irregular Past Simple, and time connectors from Chương 5.
writing.sampleAnswer: Two years ago, I visited Hue with my classmates. First, we explored the old citadel. Then we took a lot of photos. We didn't have a map at first, so we got lost. Finally, a kind local helped us, and everything was fine.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 4 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 5
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu
